productDisplayName: Global Desi Women Printed Blue Kurti
description: CompositionBlue round neck kurti made of 100% cotton, has a split neck with a yoke, sequin and lace detailing at the yoke, three quarter sleeves and a vented hemFitRegularWash careDry clean for the first two washes and hand wash in mild detergent thereafterWarm ironTrue to its name, global desi specialises in global styles with ethnic Indian threads and print. Combining classic prints on modern cuts with slimming silhouettes, this Indo-Western kurti blends cuts, colour, embellishments and the vibrancy of Indian fabrics to create a garment that you can team with a churidar, shalwar, patialas or even leggings.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
